fields.ai_narrative: A 204 Motor Carrier Load Tender was received via file upload to the edi-inbound queue on 21 March 2026 at 02:55:41 UTC and completed processing almost instantaneously, taking just 0.27 seconds. The transaction originated from sender EXPD and was directed to partner DVL6, with the payload indicating an ISA interchange and a standard load tender (B2A status code 00, suggesting a new tender). No errors or retries were recorded, and the job completed successfully without any notable issues.

fields.ai_narrative: A 204 Motor Carrier Load Tender was received via SFTP from sender CEVAPD and directed to the edi-inbound queue on 21 March 2026 at 22:31 UTC. The job completed successfully with a processing time of just 1.29 seconds, indicating no delays or retries were encountered. The payload reflects a production interchange (ISA qualifier "P") targeting partner PALLET, with load tender reference 191970800 and interchange control number 000020892.
